subject: An armored angel with large golden wings lunges forward through storm clouds wielding a blade and glowing with lightning energy
description: A winged humanoid figure clad in layered gold-and-silver armor surges forward through storm-lit clouds. Large feathered wings spread wide, their edges illuminated by bright golden lightning that arcs across the sky. The figure holds a blade in one hand and raises a clenched fist radiating energy. A flowing red sash or garment trails behind. The face is visible — short white hair, intense expression. The overall palette contrasts warm gold with dark churning blue-grey clouds.
foreground: armored angel surging forward with blade and glowing fist, large golden wings spread
